title: Better Buy: Federal Realty vs. Regency Centers
text: These two shopping center REITs sit at opposite sides of the spectrum on some key metrics.

title: Regency Centers Issues Annual Corporate Responsibility Report
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 24, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: REG) today announced the release of its annual Corporate Responsibility Report. The report highlights Regency's 2021 environmental, social, and governance achievements and future commitments, and underscores its commitment to transparency in these crucial areas. The report can be found on the Corporate Responsibility page of Regency's website.

title: Regency Centers Receives Green Lease Leaders Gold Recognition for Sustainability
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 18, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: REG) is pleased to announce that it has been included in the 2022 Green Lease Leaders list with Gold recognition, granted by the Institute for Market Transformation and the U.S. Department of Energy's Better Buildings Alliance. This award sets national standards for a green lease while recognizing landlords and tenants who modernize their leases to spur collaborative action on energy efficiency, cost savings, air quality, and sustainability in buildings. Throughout the years, Regency Centers has made great efforts to reduce environmental impacts through high-performing buildings and strong partnerships with participating tenants.

title: Regency Centers Corporation's (REG) CEO Lisa Palmer on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Regency Centers Corporation (NASDAQ:REG ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 4, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Christy McElroy – Senior Vice President of Capital Markets Lisa Palmer – President and Chief Executive Officer Jim Thompson – Chief Operating Officer Mike Mas – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Craig Schmidt – Bank of America Michael Bilerman – Citi Juan Sanabria – BMO Capital Markets Rich Hill – Morgan Stanley Samir Khanal – Evercore Michael Goldsmith – UBS Derek Johnson – Deutsche Bank Greg McGinniss – Scotiabank Linda Tsai – Jefferies Mike Mueller – JPMorgan Tammi Fique – Wells Fargo Chris Lucas – CapitalOne Operator Greetings, and welcome to Regency Centers Corporation First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. At this time all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Regency Centers (REG) Q1 FFO and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Regency Centers (REG) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 10.75% and 2.04%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Regency Centers Reports First Quarter 2022 Results
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., May 03, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: REG) today reported financial and operating results for the period ended March 31, 2022 and provided updated guidance for 2022 Nareit FFO. For the three months ended March 31, 2022 and 2021, Net Income was $1.14 per diluted share and $0.47 per diluted share, respectively.
